attention / 18	memory / 26	fluency / 14	language / 26	visuospatial / 16	sum / 100	sampling rate	AD or MCI or CONTROL
** MCI is mild cognitive inpairment
** AD is Alzheimer's disease
** normal is control
** dataset contains 7 MCI, 59 AD, 102 controls
